text: Hi Usama. On the same module, I have another problem. And this was working perfectly fine when I sent it to you. I'm not sure what's happening now. So you see on the report two, this block here, these lines are supposed to first of all activate the new bulk operation file. This line is working. But then this is not working. This is supposed to clear the filters. That's not working. And it was working when I sent it to you, even after you sent me the corrected one. So I'm not sure what's going on. Could you please look into it and then make sure that. I mean this works and clears the filters. I may need some more help. So maybe this is one of the. One of them. After you are done with this, I'll check if everything else is working fine, then I'll. I mean, so it may be a little bit of ongoing nature for a while, but let me know after fixing these lines. Thank you.
